mapper.select: SELECT id, type_id, label, value, color, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time FROM sys_dict_item WHERE type_id = #{typeId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_dict_item SET label = #{label}, value = #{value}, color = #{color}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
